zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne de Rollancourt於1139年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯洛藍古特時，她的父親Jehan de Rollancourt31歲，母親Marie Catherine de Crequy18歲。她於1158年與Hugues d'Ardres在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯洛藍古特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1200年在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯卡拉斯享年61歲。

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne de Rollancourt was born in 1139, in Rollancourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, her father, Jehan de Rollancourt, was 31 and her mother, Marie Catherine de Crequy, was 18. She married Hugues d'Ardres in 1158, in Rollancourt, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1200, in Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne de Rollancourt est née en 1139, à Rollancourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Jehan de Rollancourt, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Marie Catherine de Crequy, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Hugues d'Ardres en 1158, à Rollancourt, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1200, à Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jeanne de Rollancourt 1139 in Rollancourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jehan de Rollancourt 31 und ihre Mutter Marie Catherine de Crequy 18. Sie hat 1158 in Rollancourt, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich Hugues d'Ardres geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1200 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Rollancourt è nata il nel 1139 nel Rollancourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Jehan de Rollancourt, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Marie Catherine de Crequy, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Hugues d'Ardres nel 1158, nel Rollancourt, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1200, nel Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, all'età di 61 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Rollancourt(이)가 1139년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 롤랭쿠르트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jehan de Rollancourt(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marie Catherine de Crequy(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1158년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 롤랭쿠르트에서 Hugues d'Ardres(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1200년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 캘레이에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Rollancourt nasceu em 1139, em Rollancourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Jehan de Rollancourt, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Marie Catherine de Crequy, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugues d'Ardres em 1158, em Rollancourt, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1200, em Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne de Rollancourt родилась в 1139 г. в местности ролланкоурт, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Jehan de Rollancourt было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Marie Catherine de Crequy, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugues d'Ardres в 1158 г. в местности ролланкоурт, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1200 г. в местности калеи, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jeanne de Rollancourt nació en 1139, en Rollancourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Jehan de Rollancourt, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Marie Catherine de Crequy, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Hugues d'Ardres en 1158, en Rollancourt, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1200, en Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 61 años.
